title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
summary: A YouTube video discusses Google DeepMind's "From AGI to ASI" paper, arguing that AGI may be a milestone rather than an endpoint. The video suggests that once AI reaches human-level capability, replication, acceleration, and recursive self-improvement through AI-building-AI could represent a more significant transition than AGI itself.
writeup: The video examines Google DeepMind's "From AGI to ASI" paper, which frames artificial general intelligence as a milestone rather than a final destination. The central argument: once AI matches human-level capability, the more consequential shift comes from replication, acceleration, and recursive self-improvement, with AI building AI. It situates this transition against concepts including AI agents and test-time compute, positioning the move from AGI to ASI as the point that matters most.
